Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Empire]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Of Sea and Shadow ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 3''' — The Empire has been held together for five years by four Regents.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 5''' — The Empire officially registered all Soulbound on the continent.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 6''' — The characters have traveled throughout the Empire.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 8''' — The Blackwatch studies Elders to defend the Empire.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 9''' — The Empire holds a deep hatred for the Elders.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 15''' — The Empire is ruled by an Elderspawned ruler.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 16''' — The Empire is at risk of civilization disappearing if no one directs it.}}

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 1''' — The Empire is the governing body mentioned in the text.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 3''' — The Empire contains Readers.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 9''' — The Empire is an imperfect realm.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 17''' — The Empire is divided into regions under four Regents.}}

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 8''' — The Empire is at risk of falling apart due to a lack of cooperation between Guilds.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 9''' — The Empire is a governing body that some villages feel they are not truly part of.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 12''' — Calder's crew was willing to defy the Empire.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 14''' — The loyal Guilds of the Empire will protect the people.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 23''' — The Empire is a political entity that Calder intends to steer.}}

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 4''' — The Emperor has an influence on the Empire.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 7''' — The Empire is a political entity containing the town of Silverreach.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 19''' — The Empire is described as weak and having collapsed in on itself.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 21''' — The Great Elders want to destroy the Empire.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 22''' — The Empire is weakening.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 22''' — The Empire is an organization that the Consultants might join.}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 5''' — The Empire's emblem is the moon-in-sun.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 9''' — The Empire is a political entity mentioned by Cheska.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 12''' — The Empire would benefit from the return of the crown.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 19''' — Being ruled by someone of human lifespan would benefit the Empire.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 24''' — The forces of the Empire appeared to have things well in hand.}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 10''' — Kelarac holds the reins of the Empire.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 13''' — Shera has served the Empire.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 18''' — The Empire is a political entity described in the Introductory History of the Empire.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 21''' — Lucan is willing to go to prison to serve the Empire.}}

== Soulsmith ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 7''' — The Empire is a political entity.}}

== Blackflame ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 2''' — Eithan has homes in the Empire.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 16''' — The Empire contains great clans.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 21''' — Jai Chen and Lindon are currently in the real Empire.}}

== Skysworn ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 2''' — The Empire is capable of executing a clan if they detect them.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 6''' — Eithan refers to his beloved Empire.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 7''' — Eithan's actions may have indirectly led to the destruction of the entire Empire.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 13''' — Lindon wishes to serve the Empire.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 15''' — The Empire is described as having the biggest hammer.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 15''' — The Skysworn will not put Lindon's group anywhere that could hurt the Empire.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 16''' — The Empire is in a crisis.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 18''' — The Empire will punish Lindon and Yerin lightly for their absence.}}

== Ghostwater ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 2''' — The Empire is the political entity the Skysworn serves.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 19''' — The Empire is described as tiny and insignificant by the Monarch.}}

== Underlord ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 8''' — Orthos passes through a portal back to the Empire.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 10''' — The Blackflame boy was near the border of Empire territory.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 15''' — The Akura are located within the Empire.}}

== Uncrowned ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 9''' — The Empire has better lines of communication than the Frozen Blade school.}}

== Wintersteel ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 5''' — Naru Saeya tells Lindon to present himself to the Emperor when he returns to the Empire.}}

== Waybound ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 17''' — The Empire has members who can borrow Monarch power.}}

== The Engineer ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 12''' — The Empire is in a generations-long war with the Lichborn.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 33''' — The Empire is a group that may have the Rebel Queen.}}

== The Knight ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 13''' — The Empire is a political entity related to Visiria.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
